fields.label: Template Name
fields.description: e.g., Task Overdue Reminder, Timesheet Missing Nudge

fields.label: Event Type
fields.options:
Task Overdue
Task Due Today
Task Due This Week
Task Assigned
Task Status Changed
Task Completed
Task Escalation Level 1
Task Escalation Level 2
Timesheet Missing
Timesheet Incomplete
Weekly Manager Digest
Monthly Statutory Tasks Created
Custom
fields.description: The automation event that triggers this notification

fields.label: Send Via
fields.description: Which channel(s) to use. 'All' respects user's preference.

fields.label: Subject
fields.description: Jinja2 template. Variables: {{ task_name }}, {{ assignee }}, {{ due_date }}, {{ project }}, etc.

fields.label: Message Body
fields.description: Jinja2 template for the notification body. Supports all context variables.

fields.label: Available Variables
fields.options:
Common Variables:
{{ task_name }} - Task subject
{{ task_id }} - Task ID (e.g., TASK-00123)
{{ assignee }} - Assigned user's full name
{{ assignee_email }} - Assigned user's email
{{ project }} - Project name
{{ due_date }} - Due date
{{ days_overdue }} - Number of days overdue
{{ priority }} - Task priority
{{ status }} - Task status
{{ manager }} - Reporting manager's name
{{ total_hours }} - Hours logged (timesheets)
{{ expected_hours }} - Expected hours
{{ date }} - Current date
{{ site_url }} - ERPNext site URL
